subject: [RFC v2 12/21] mm: thp: handle split failure in device migration

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Identified a double-put bug and suggested adding folio_put for split_huge_pmd_address failure, but not for folio_split_unmapped. Provided test results to demonstrate the issue.

2026-03-05.patch_summary: The patch aims to handle split failure in device migration by adding folio_put for split_huge_pmd_address failure, but not for folio_split_unmapped.
